summary: Mamdani leads 4-way general election by ~17-19 points. CP currently at 0.90, below 0.91 threshold.
content:
Key findings for post 39935:
- Mamdani won Dem primary June 24, 2025 (56.4% final round RCV)
- General election Nov 4, 2025 is 4-way: Mamdani (D), Cuomo (I), Adams (I), Sliwa (R)
- Poll aggregates (Sep 9): Mamdani 42.6-44%, Cuomo 24.5-25%, Sliwa 13.9-15%, Adams 9.5-9.8%
- Mamdani leads by ~17-19 points
- Jim Walden dropped out Sep 2 urging consolidation
- Adams announced Sep 5 he's NOT dropping out
- Sliwa also staying in
- Trump has threatened Mamdani, endorsed Adams
- CP history: was 0.92-0.93 in early Sept, drifted to 0.90 by Sep 7 and has been there since
- CP has been exactly 0.90 for 8 straight days (Sep 7-14)
- 133 forecasters on the underlying question
